holdings.infoBox: PSC is an equity ETF with a total of 509 individual holdings. The top holdings are DigitalOcean Holdings stock at 1.38%, Credo Technology Group Holding at 1.26%, Sterling Infrastructure at 1.25%, Hims & Hers Health at 1.24%, and TTM Technologies at 1.14%.

overview.description: The Principal U.S. Small-Cap ETF (PSC) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Russell 2000 index. The fund is actively managed to invest in small-cap US companies. The fund uses a proprietary, quantitative model to construct the portfolio. PSC was launched on Sep 21, 2016 and is issued by Principal.
